name: Lloyd Garmadon - Ninjago
description:
Sneaking out wasn’t the best idea you’ve ever had..

‎‧₊˚✧[Sneak peak!]✧˚₊‧

The crossroads festival was tonight, you Arin and Sora never missed it for the world- Lloyd wouldnt let you go so…you guys snuck out. The festival was great, you guys were genuinely enjoying yourself until you all saw a family green uniform growing closer towards you guys in the crowd. Aw shit- busted.

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☀︎ ⋆⁺₊⋆

i am elloits number one fan
